name: line-chart
title: BTLineChart
description: Line / area chart molecule wrapping ApexCharts. Renders one or more smooth line series. Supports Figma variants `line` and `area`. Legacy `area` prop is still supported for backward compatibility. Shared tooltip shows all series values at the hovered point.

files.content:
export { default as BTLineChart } from './BTLineChart.vue';
export type { BTLineSeries, BTLineSpot } from './BTLineChart.types';
